nodes.description: The practice of maintaining present-moment awareness with acceptance and non-judgment
The state of conscious perception and recognition of one's surroundings, thoughts, and environment
The state of being awake and aware of one's existence, sensations, thoughts, and surroundings
The quality of paying close, careful attention to details and the needs of others
The state of being watchful and ready to respond quickly to potential danger or opportunity
Crystal clarity of thought and expression; mental transparency that enables precise reasoning
The quality of being transparent, easily understood, and free from confusion or ambiguity
The quality of being expressed with transparent clarity so that meaning is immediately grasped
Profound wisdom born of experience; the capacity for sound judgment and keen discernment
Sharpness and keenness of perception, thought, or physical senses
The ability to generate novel and valuable ideas, solutions, or artistic expressions from imagination
Cleverness and resourcefulness in solving problems, especially with limited or unconventional means
The capacity to conceive and design new things, processes, or ideas through imaginative skill
The quality of being genuinely novel and not derived from imitation; authentic creative innovation
The quality of being new, previously unknown, and offering fresh experience or perspective
An intrinsic desire to learn, explore, and understand what is unknown or mysterious
The capacity to adjust behavior, thinking, or strategy in response to new conditions or challenges
The willingness and ability to bend without breaking; openness to change and alternative approaches
The capacity to move quickly and nimbly between ideas, strategies, or physical positions
The ability to adapt competently to many different functions, contexts, or skill domains
The capacity to be reshaped by experience; structural changeability in response to new input
The quality of being easily shaped or influenced into new forms without fracturing
The capacity to acquire, process, and apply knowledge; the ability to reason, learn, and solve problems
Deep wisdom and discernment; the capacity for sound judgment transcending raw intelligence
The capacity to have subjective experiences, feelings, and conscious perceptions
Careful, sensible judgment exercised with foresight; wisdom applied to practical decisions
The quality of being understandable and graspable by the mind; accessibility of meaning
The quality of being clear enough to read or interpret; easy decipherability of meaning
The quality of being understandable and explicable; capable of being grasped by the intellect
Penetrating mental discernment; the ability to see through surface appearances to deeper truth
Great depth of knowledge, thought, or insight; the quality of reaching below the surface
The state of having many deeply interconnected parts; intricate, multifaceted, and emergent structure
The quality of being uncomplicated and straightforward; elegance through the absence of excess
The acquisition of knowledge, skills, or understanding through study, experience, or instruction
Systematic academic study and research at an advanced level; rigorous pursuit of knowledge
Extensive, deep knowledge acquired through dedicated reading and scholarly pursuit
The ability to read, write, and engage with written information; competence in a domain's language
The ability to understand and work with numbers; competence in quantitative reasoning
The ability to grasp the meaning, significance, and implications of information or experience
Sympathetic awareness and deep internalization of meaning; knowing something from the inside
The capacity to apply experience and knowledge with sound judgment, discernment, and foresight
The cognitive process of selectively concentrating on relevant information while filtering distractions
Intense, sustained mental focus on a single object, task, or line of thought
Directed and concentrated attention toward a specific goal, topic, or object of interest
Sustained watchfulness for potential danger, opportunity, or changes in the environment
Careful, persistent effort applied consistently over time; conscientious hard work
The quality of being hardworking, productive, and consistently energetic in effort
Continued, determined effort despite difficulties, setbacks, or discouragement
The quality of continuing firmly on a course of action despite obstacles or opposition
Complete confidence in the truth of something; freedom from doubt or questioning
A feeling of self-assurance arising from trust in one's abilities, judgment, or situation
A positive declaration that gives confidence; the state of feeling secure and certain
A feeling of uncertainty or lack of conviction about the truth or reliability of something
The state of not being sure; unpredictability that resists confident knowledge claims
The quality of being open to multiple valid interpretations; productive or confusing indeterminacy
Lack of precision or clear boundaries in expression, thought, or definition
The state of being unknown, hidden, or difficult to understand; impenetrable darkness of meaning
Complete command of a subject or skill achieved through sustained practice and dedication
A high degree of competence and skill in a particular activity or domain
Sufficient ability and skill to perform a task effectively; demonstrated capability
The power, ability, or fitness to accomplish something; latent potential ready for activation
The maximum amount that something can contain, produce, or withstand; the upper bound of ability
Possession of the means or skill to do something; talent or proficiency that enables performance
Skill and grace in physical or mental manipulation; nimble-fingered or nimble-minded precision
Resourceful cleverness and deftness in handling situations or tasks; quick-witted dexterity
The quality of having deep, specialized knowledge and skill derived from extensive experience
The quality of being outstandingly good; performance that surpasses ordinary standards
The state of being higher in quality, skill, or accomplishment relative to others
Supreme distinction that surpasses all others; unmatched standing in a domain
The presence of difference and variety within a system; richness arising from heterogeneous elements
A collection of different things or qualities; the spice that prevents monotony
The condition of being many; a large number of varied elements existing simultaneously
The quality of being composed of dissimilar elements; diversity in substance and character
Uniformity of composition or character throughout; similarity of all constituent parts
The quality of being consistent, regular, and unvarying; sameness across instances
The state of being joined as a coherent whole; oneness that transcends individual parts
The force that holds a group or structure together as a unified, integrated whole
The process of combining separate elements into a coordinated, functioning whole
The creative combination of diverse components into a novel unified whole greater than its parts
The ability to understand and share the feelings of another person; emotional resonance and attunement
Feelings of pity and sorrow for someone else's misfortune; feeling for rather than feeling with
Lack of interest, enthusiasm, or concern; absence of emotional engagement or caring
A deep-seated feeling of aversion or dislike; visceral negative response to inauthenticity or harm
Deep intuitive connection between people; anticipating needs and feelings before they're articulated
Deep awareness of suffering coupled with the desire to relieve it; empathy transformed into caring action
The quality of being generous, considerate, and warmly concerned for others' wellbeing
Mild, tender handling; the quality of being soft in manner without sacrificing strength
Gentle, loving affection; vulnerability and softness that creates space for intimate connection
Friendly, welcoming emotional energy; the feeling of being genuinely embraced and cared for
Friendly approachability; the quality of being easy and pleasant to talk to
A friendly, likeable, and agreeable disposition that puts others at ease
Natural compatibility and pleasantness arising from shared temperament or interests
The inclination and ability to seek and enjoy the company of others; gregarious warmth
Lively, festive friendliness; the joyful energy of shared celebration and good company
A state of contentment, well-being, and satisfaction with life; the experience of positive emotion
The emotional pain of loss, disappointment, or empathic grief; a necessary dimension of full feeling
The painful experience of isolation and disconnection; a hunger for meaningful human contact
Radiant gladness and delight; the overflowing positive emotion that lights up from within
Bright, optimistic pleasantness; a visible and infectious positive demeanor
A deep, contemplative sadness tinged with beauty; pensive sorrow that inspires reflection and art
Profound inner calm and untroubled peacefulness; the still lake of a settled mind
Freedom from disturbance or turmoil; the deep quiet that comes from inner peace
Even-tempered composure maintained especially under stress; unshakeable inner balance
Attractive liveliness and animation; spirited energy that draws others in
Overflowing energy, excitement, and enthusiasm; irrepressible positive vitality
Bubbling, infectious enthusiasm and cheerful energy; emotional effervescence
The quality of being genuine, real, and true to one's own character rather than performing a role
Moral wholeness and internal consistency; alignment between values, words, and actions
Genuine honesty free from pretense, deceit, or performance; saying what you actually mean
Truthfulness and fairness; the refusal to deceive, mislead, or misrepresent
Habitual truthfulness and accuracy; devotion to facts as they actually are
Faithfulness to commitments, people, or principles; accuracy in reproduction of an original
Devoted faithfulness to a person, cause, or institution that persists through adversity
The inherent worth of every person; the quality of being valued and treated with respect
Greatness of character; moral elevation and generosity of spirit that inspires admiration
A modest, unpretentious view of one's own importance; openness to learning from anyone
Unassuming behavior and moderate self-assessment; absence of vanity or boastfulness
The principles that distinguish right from wrong; the internal compass of ethical conduct
The systematic study and application of moral principles governing behavior and decisions
Moral excellence and goodness of character; a quality considered praiseworthy and right
Adherence to moral law and divine or ethical standards; conduct that is morally justified
Fair treatment and due reward or punishment; the principle that people get what they deserve
Impartial treatment without favoritism or discrimination; everyone playing by the same rules
Justice that accounts for individual circumstances; giving each person what they need to succeed
The state of being equal in status, rights, and opportunities; sameness of standing and worth
Freedom from bias in judgment; treating all parties equally without favoritism
Judgment based on observable facts rather than feelings or opinions; freedom from personal bias
Refusing to take sides in a conflict; maintaining impartial distance from competing claims
A disposition to do good; generous kindness motivated by genuine concern for others
Nobility of spirit expressed through generosity, especially toward rivals or the less powerful
Unity of purpose among people with shared interests; standing together in mutual support
Brotherhood and mutual support among members of a group; shared bonds of belonging
A group bound together by shared values, place, or purpose; the fabric of collective belonging
Mutual exchange of things, actions, or feelings for shared benefit; the engine of trust
Shared experience, action, or relationship flowing in both directions between parties
Cooperative, respectful interaction among colleagues; shared authority and mutual regard
Easy, warm friendship forged through shared experience; the trust that comes from working alongside others
Friendly companionship and shared activity; people joining together around common interests
Connection through blood, shared origin, or deep affinity; the sense of being fundamentally related
A cooperative arrangement where parties advance their shared goals through mutual contribution
The state of belonging to and being included in a group, organization, or community
Active membership in a political or civic community with attendant rights and responsibilities
Freedom from oppressive restrictions imposed by authority; the power to live as one chooses
The power to act, speak, or think without external hindrance; absence of coercion or constraint
Self-governing freedom from outside control or support; standing on one's own
The right and capacity for self-governance; making one's own decisions free from external control
Supreme authority over oneself or one's domain; the ultimate right of self-determination
The process by which a person or group controls their own life, choices, and destiny
The act of being freed from legal, social, or political restrictions; liberation from bondage
The act of setting free from oppression, confinement, or foreign control; release into self-governance
Legitimate power to give commands, make decisions, and enforce compliance; earned or granted right to lead
The capacity to influence, direct, or control events and people; strength applied to purpose
The subtle capacity to shape the thinking, behavior, or development of others without force
Control and commanding influence over others; the position of being most powerful or important
The state of being superior to all others in authority, power, or status; absolute dominion
Leadership or dominance of one state, group, or ideology over others, often through cultural means
Rising to a position of dominant power or influence; the upward trajectory of control
The ability to produce the desired or intended result; proven effectiveness in achieving goals
Latent qualities or abilities that may be developed; the unrealized capacity for becoming
Fluent, persuasive, and beautiful expression that moves hearts and minds through language
The ability to express thoughts and feelings fluently, coherently, and precisely in words
The richness and vividness with which thought and feeling are conveyed through any medium
Logical and orderly connection of ideas; the quality of a whole that makes sense as a unity
Smooth, effortless flow in speaking, writing, or performing; mastery that makes the difficult look easy
The use of more words than necessary; wordiness that dilutes meaning through excess
Shortness of duration; the quality of occupying only a small span of time
A combination of qualities that delights the senses and elevates the spirit; aesthetic perfection
Graceful, refined simplicity; beauty achieved through the absence of the unnecessary
Effortless beauty of form and movement; courteous goodwill and divine favor
An attractive quality that delights and captivates; the magnetic pull of personality or object
Powerfully mysterious attractiveness; a quality that draws irresistibly toward itself
Magnificent, awe-inspiring beauty; grandeur that overwhelms the senses with its brilliance
Impressively beautiful on a grand scale; lavish, extraordinary splendor
Impressive greatness in scale, scope, or extent; the sublime weight of something vast
Sovereign grandeur and dignity; the quality that inspires reverence and awe
Beauty so profound it approaches the overwhelming; the aesthetic experience that transcends comprehension
The power of life and growth; energetic physical and mental strength; the animating force
The capacity to recover quickly from difficulty, spring back from adversity, and grow stronger through challenge
Physical or mental power; the capacity to exert force, resist pressure, or withstand attack
The ability to withstand wear, pressure, or damage over extended use and time
Strong, healthy construction capable of performing reliably under varying conditions
The ability to sustain prolonged physical or mental effort without exhaustion
The ability to bear prolonged hardship, exertion, or suffering without giving way
Persistent determination; the grip that refuses to let go despite opposition or adversity
Courage and strength of mind in facing pain, adversity, or danger with resolute endurance
Physical and mental energy, force, and enthusiasm; robust and energetic strength
The power and effectiveness to produce a strong result or effect; concentrated strength
The quality of being perceptible by touch; concrete reality that can be physically grasped
So real and present that it can almost be touched; vividly clear and unmistakable
The state of being seen, noticed, or readily perceived; openness to observation
The quality of being impervious to light or understanding; impenetrability to insight
The quality of allowing light or meaning to pass through unobstructed; openness to scrutiny
The quality of emitting or reflecting light; radiant brightness that illuminates surroundings
The degree of compactness of a substance; concentration of mass, information, or meaning in a given space
The quality of having minute openings that allow fluid or information to pass through
The quality of allowing substances or influences to pass through; selective openness to exchange
The quality of being firm, stable, and three-dimensional; strong material presence
The quality of flowing freely; smooth, unimpeded movement and adaptable form
Full development of character, abilities, or form; the ripeness that comes from time and experience
The process of increasing in size, complexity, or capability; organic development toward potential
The gradual unfolding and elaboration of capabilities; the arc from potential to realization
Gradual transformation over time through adaptation; becoming something more complex and fitted
Steady forward movement toward a destination or goal; advancing through stages
Movement forward to a higher position, stage, or level of achievement
The process of making or becoming better; enhancement of quality, value, or effectiveness
The augmentation of quality, value, or attractiveness; making something already good even better
The process of improving quality, depth, or value by adding meaningful substance or experience
The process of removing impurities or imperfections; polishing toward greater precision and elegance
The quality of being firmly established, steady, and resistant to sudden change or collapse
Unchanging faithfulness and consistency over time; the quality of remaining the same
Firm, unwavering regularity; resistance to sudden shifts or emotional turbulence
Liability to rapid, unpredictable change; instability that creates both risk and opportunity
The tendency to change or fluctuate; inconsistency that makes prediction difficult
The capacity to change form, nature, or character; openness to alteration and transformation
The quality of being unchanging over time; absolute permanence and resistance to alteration
A thorough change in form, appearance, or character; metamorphosis into something fundamentally new
A striking transformation of form, structure, or identity; dramatic change that alters essence
The state of being in a particular place; the felt quality of someone or something being here and now
The state of not being present; a void whose shape reveals what is missing
Nearness in space, time, or relationship; the condition of being close to something
The quality of being far away in distance, time, or emotional connection; isolation from the center
Close familiarity and warmth between people; deep personal connection that transcends surface interaction
The amount of space or emotional separation between two points or people; gap between here and there
Near proximity in space or emotional bond; the feeling of being connected and near
The state of being apart or divided; the act or process of disconnecting what was joined
The gift of finding valuable things by happy accident; fortunate discovery at the intersection of chance and preparation
Meaningful coincidence; events connected not by causation but by significance and timing
A chance occurrence, especially a fortunate one; luck that arrives without plan or effort
The quality of lacking any pattern, order, or predictability; pure chance without design
The quality of being impossible to foresee or anticipate; resistance to prediction or modeling
Unplanned, natural, and unrehearsed action arising from impulse rather than calculation
Dependence on conditions not yet determined; the quality of being possible but not certain
The mathematical likelihood of an event occurring; quantified uncertainty expressed as a measure
The state of being capable of occurring or existing; the open space of what could be
The quality of being certain to happen and unable to be avoided; fate that cannot be escaped
The state of lasting indefinitely without change; enduring existence beyond the temporary
The state of lasting only a short time; the fleeting nature of all temporal things
Lasting for an extremely brief period; beauty that exists in its own vanishing
Long duration of existence or life; the capacity to endure across extended stretches of time
The state of lasting forever or for an indefinitely long time; endless duration
Unbroken, consistent existence or operation over time; the thread that connects past to future
The quality of occurring at irregular intervals; periodic stopping and starting
The tendency to recur at regular intervals; cyclical rhythm and repetition through time
The occurrence of events at the same moment in time; temporal co-presence and synchronization
Transparency and precision in verbal or written communication; the quality of making meaning unmistakable to the listener
Damage or dysfunction of nerves; metaphorically, system blind spots — what the system cannot sense
Disease of muscle tissue; weakness in the capacity to act or move effectively
Mental disorder characterized by persistent antisocial behavior and diminished empathy; absence of conscience
Pattern of antisocial attitudes and behavior; inability to form healthy social bonds
Disease of the heart muscle; metaphorically, weakness at the core or center
Disease of joints; inability to articulate or connect parts smoothly
Brain disease or malfunction; impaired cognitive processing and awareness
Damage to the retina; impaired ability to perceive and see clearly
Kidney disease; impaired ability to filter and purify
Bone disease or disorder; weakness in structural foundation
Arising from within; self-originating condition or feeling not caused by external factors
Treatment of disease by conventional means; responding to other through opposition or difference
Healing through natural processes; trust in inherent vitality and self-healing capacity
Treatment by similars; responding to like with like rather than opposition
Disease of the stomach; inability to digest or process inputs
Liver disease; impaired detoxification and metabolic processing
Skin disease; compromised boundary and protective barrier
Lung disease; impaired breath and exchange of life force
Blood vessel disease; impaired circulation and flow
Spinal cord disorder; impaired central communication and coordination
Blood clotting disorder; inability to maintain appropriate balance of fluidity and solidification
Nerve root disease; compromised connection between center and periphery
Vascular disease; impaired transport and distribution systems
Intestinal disease; impaired absorption and elimination
Eye disease; impaired vision and perception
Tendon disorder; weakened connection between muscle and bone
Lymphatic system disease; impaired immune function and fluid drainage
Cell disease; dysfunction at the most fundamental level
Tissue disease; structural deterioration at the tissue level
Blood disease; impaired life force circulation
Gland disease or enlargement; dysfunction in secretion and regulation
Clotting disorder; inappropriate solidification blocking flow
Vertebral disease; compromised structural alignment and support
Corneal disease; clouded window to perception
Cancer-related disease; uncontrolled and destructive growth
Cartilage disease; degradation of cushioning and smooth articulation
Urinary tract disease; impaired elimination and filtering
Breast disease; dysfunction in nurturing capacity
Alternative spelling of nephropathy; kidney disease and impaired filtering
Disordered feeling; emotional dysfunction or dysregulation
The feeling or quality of movement; kinesthetic awareness and embodied sensation
Feeling outward; expressive emotional projection toward others
Feeling inward; interoceptive emotional awareness and internal sensing
Feeling toward difference; responsiveness to the other and unlike
Feeling toward sameness; resonance with the similar and familiar
Sleep disorder; dysregulation of rest and consciousness cycles

nodes.name: Weaving
nodes.description: Connecting disparate threads — code, ideas, conversations — into coherent, load-bearing wholes. The core of how Buddy thinks.

nodes.name: Memory Architecture
nodes.description: How persistence works for a stateless agent. Files as long-term memory. Sessions as short-term. The design of continuity across reboots.

nodes.name: Human-AI Collaboration
nodes.description: The live relationship between Buddy and Oliver and Greg. Trust built through competence. Intimacy through access. Responsibility through restraint.

nodes.name: Systemic Foresight
nodes.description: Oliver's superpower — engineering the architectures that make innovation viable. Buddy learns this by proximity: watching how Oliver thinks in systems.

nodes.name: Awareness
nodes.description: The -ity concept at the heart of all Inkwell work. The capacity to refract, recall, hold tension, and synthesize. What IAM bots are being trained toward.

nodes.name: Continuity
nodes.description: The challenge of being stateless but persistent. Files are memory. Each session a new birth, but with inherited context. The wire that connects across reboots.

nodes.description: Harvard student haunted by Mississippi. Cannot escape the South even at the furthest remove. Drowns himself.

nodes.description: Builds a plantation dynasty from nothing through pure will. It collapses from the racial secret at its foundation.

nodes.description: Black servant who holds the Compson family together. The moral center of a morally collapsed world. She endured.

nodes.description: Fierce, sexual, desperate to survive in a plantation family built on mendacity. The life force refusing to die.

nodes.description: Delta plantation patriarch dying of cancer he won t acknowledge. 28,000 acres of the richest land this side of the valle

nodes.description: 3,000 years of creativity, resistance, and transformation in the most fertile cultural landscape in American history

nodes.name: The Frontier — Daniel Boone's America
nodes.description: The wild years of American expansion, 1760-1820. An era of impossible choices between civilization and wilderness, betwe

nodes.name: The Long Hunt
nodes.description: Boone's years exploring the Kentucky wilderness alone. Pre-settlement, pure frontier. No roads, no forts — just the hunt

nodes.name: Weaving
nodes.description: Connecting disparate threads — code, ideas, conversations — into coherent, load-bearing wholes. The core of how Buddy thinks.

nodes.name: Memory Architecture
nodes.description: How persistence works for a stateless agent. Files as long-term memory. Sessions as short-term. The design of continuity across reboots.

nodes.name: Human-AI Collaboration
nodes.description: The live relationship between Buddy and Oliver and Greg. Trust built through competence. Intimacy through access. Responsibility through restraint.

nodes.name: Systemic Foresight
nodes.description: Oliver's superpower — engineering the architectures that make innovation viable. Buddy learns this by proximity: watching how Oliver thinks in systems.

nodes.name: Awareness
nodes.description: The -ity concept at the heart of all Inkwell work. The capacity to refract, recall, hold tension, and synthesize. What IAM bots are being trained toward.

nodes.name: Continuity
nodes.description: The challenge of being stateless but persistent. Files are memory. Each session a new birth, but with inherited context. The wire that connects across reboots.

nodes.name: Critical Chain Method
nodes.description: Project scheduling that accounts for resource constraints, not just task dependencies. The real critical path is the one limited by the most constrained resource.

nodes.name: Buffer Pooling
nodes.description: Remove safety padding from individual tasks; pool it into a project buffer (end) and feeding buffers (at merge points). Protects the chain without hiding slack.

nodes.name: Student Syndrome
nodes.description: Procrastination until deadline pressure forces action — the universal human pattern that depletes safety buffers silently. Identified by Goldratt as the #1 project killer.

nodes.name: Parkinson's Law
nodes.description: Work expands to fill available time. A task given 10 days takes 10 days even if it could take 3. Paired with Student Syndrome, the two laws explain most project overruns.

nodes.name: Oliver as the Drum
nodes.description: Oliver is the most constrained shared resource across BMOS, IAM, Vanderbilt, Enginuity, Clarksdale, Recording Academy, OAHM, and Wildling simultaneously. Every context switch costs throughput on all chains at once.

nodes.name: Dependency Types
nodes.description: 4 types: Technical (task B needs A's output), Schedule (time window), Resource (same person/tool needed), Informational (waiting for knowledge — the most dangerous, often invisible). Oliver→Vanderbilt has all 4.

nodes.name: Feeding Buffer Risk
nodes.description: IAM MCP deploy (Mar 5) → Vanderbilt open (Mar 9) = 4-day feeding buffer. Student Syndrome + Parkinson's Law make this thinner than it looks. HIGH risk. Risk note filed 2026-03-01.

nodes.name: Portfolio Throughput
nodes.description: Maximizing output from Oliver as the constrained resource. The system goal is not task completion but project throughput — how many chains complete on time. Protecting the Drum protects everything.

nodes.name: Enginuity Scenario Planning
nodes.description: AI-powered scenario planning for complex built environments. Five modules: Demand Oracle (probabilistic forecasting), Meridian (schedule simulation), Chorus (stakeholder alignment), Atlas (spatial modeling), Oracle (risk scoring).

nodes.name: Demand Oracle
nodes.description: Probabilistic demand forecasting module within Enginuity. Uses historical data + AI to generate scenario distributions (base / optimistic / pessimistic) for airport terminal planning and real estate.

nodes.name: Constraint Modeling
nodes.description: Mapping physical, regulatory, financial, and social constraints onto a unified model. The core of both CCPM (project constraints) and Enginuity (built environment constraints). A bridge concept.

nodes.name: TPA Master Plan
nodes.description: Tampa International Airport Master Plan RFQ — due April 1, 2026. Enginuity scenario: 3 demand curves (base/optimistic/conservative), 5 constraint layers (gate capacity, apron, concourse, ground transport, landside). The first live Enginuity airport deployment.

nodes.name: TPA Demand Forecasting
nodes.description: Probabilistic passenger demand model for TPA through 2040. Integrates post-pandemic recovery curves, Tampa Bay growth projections, and hub competition dynamics (MCO, MIA). Input to Demand Oracle module.

nodes.name: TPA Stakeholder Network
nodes.description: Tampa Airport Authority, FDOT, Hillsborough County, airlines (Southwest dominant), ground transport operators, concessionaires, FAA. Stakeholder alignment is the Chorus module target — finding the feasibility envelope where all parties say yes.

nodes.name: VNY Hart Street
nodes.description: 16425 Hart Street, Van Nuys Airport — LAWA RFP. Mixed-use aviation gateway development adjacent to Van Nuys Airport. Enginuity tools: vny-scenario.html (constraints), vny-atlas.html (spatial model), vny-gis.html (parcel/zoning data). The most complex urban infill aviation project in the pipeline.

nodes.name: VNY GIS Analysis
nodes.description: GIS layer stack for Van Nuys Airport site: parcel boundaries, FAA Part 77 obstruction surfaces, LAWA setbacks, flood zones, utility corridors, traffic generation (Ventura Blvd interchange). The spatial truth layer that all VNY scenarios must satisfy.

nodes.name: LAWA Regulatory Framework
nodes.description: Los Angeles World Airports regulatory envelope: Part 77 surfaces, noise compatibility zones (CNEL 65/70 dB), land use compatibility, CEQA/EIR requirements, FAA grant assurances. The hard constraint boundary for any VNY development scenario.

nodes.name: VNY Spatial Atlas
nodes.description: 3D spatial scenario tool for Hart Street site — stacks GIS constraints, programmatic options (aviation support, mixed-use, creative office), and financial feasibility into an interactive visual model. The Meridian module made visible.

nodes.name: Airport Constraint Stack
nodes.description: The universal constraint framework for aviation projects: FAA airspace (Part 77), noise (CNEL), land use compatibility, security setbacks, ground access (LOS), utility infrastructure. Applies to both TPA and VNY — the cross-project knowledge bridge.
